datatype.description: The data type for the column

nullable.description: Specifies that the column does allow NULL values or not

default.description: Specifies whether a default value is automatically inserted in the column if a value is not explicitly specified via an INSERT or CREATE TABLE AS SELECT statement

primary_key.description: A primary key is the column or columns that contain values that uniquely identify each row in a table

unique_key.description: Unique keys are columns in a table that uniquely identify items in the rows. This sounds a lot like a primary key, but the main difference is that unique keys can have NULL values.

comment.description: Specifies a comment for the column
